properties.title: Luxury Villa with Pool
properties.description: Stunning luxury villa with private pool, modern architecture, and premium finishes. Located in the heart of Banani with easy access to schools, hospitals, and shopping malls.

properties.title: Modern Apartment
properties.description: Contemporary apartment with breathtaking city views, premium amenities including swimming pool, gym, and 24/7 security. Prime location in Gulshan.

properties.title: Corporate Office Space
properties.description: Premium corporate office space in a prime business district. Modern facilities, high-speed elevators, parking spaces, and excellent connectivity to all parts of the city.

properties.title: Penthouse Suite
properties.description: Exclusive penthouse with panoramic city views, private terrace garden, luxury finishes throughout, and dedicated elevator access. Located in the prestigious Baridhara area.

properties.title: Commercial Retail Space
properties.description: Prime retail space in a high-traffic commercial area. Perfect for restaurants, boutiques, showrooms, or corporate offices. Modern facilities and ample parking.

properties.title: Luxury Duplex
properties.description: Elegant duplex apartment with high-end finishes, private elevator, stunning views, and premium amenities. Features include marble flooring, imported fixtures, and smart home technology.
